name: SelCommand
summary: For adding nestable whole object and subobject selection commands, derive your command from SelCommand and override the abstract SelFilter and virtual SelSubObjectFilter functions.

constructors.name: SelCommand
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SelCommand class

methods.name: OnHelp
methods.summary: Is called when the user needs assistance with this command.

methods.name: ReplayHistory
methods.summary: Repeats an operation of a command. In order to make this function work, you will likely need to grab the Result property that gives the list of input objects. Then, you will be able to replace these inputs by using one of the UpdateToX() methods of the ReplayHistoryResult.You should NOT use any document AddX() or ReplaceX() functions, as they will break history.

returns.doc: true if the operation succeeded. The default implementation always returns false.

methods.name: RunCommand
methods.signature: protected override Result RunCommand(RhinoDoc doc, RunMode mode)

methods.name: SelFilter
methods.summary: Override this abstract function and return true if object should be selected.

params.name: rhObj
params.doc: The object to check regarding selection status.

returns.doc: true if the object should be selected; false otherwise.

methods.name: SelSubObjectFilter
methods.signature: protected virtual bool SelSubObjectFilter(RhinoObject rhObj, List<ComponentIndex> indicesToSelect)
methods.summary: To select subobjects, override this virtual function, add component indices of the subobjects that should get selected to indicesToSelect list and return true. This is called only if the SelFilter returns false and the whole object does not get selected.

params.name: rhObj
params.doc: The object to check regarding selection status.

params.name: indicesToSelect
params.doc: The component indices of the subobjects to select.

returns.doc: true if components added to indicesToSelect should get selected.

properties.name: CommandContextHelpUrl
properties.summary: Gets the URL of the command contextual help. This is usually a location of a local CHM file. The default implementation return an empty string.

properties.name: EnglishName
properties.summary: Gets the name of the command. This method is abstract.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets the unique ID of this command. It is best to use a Guid attribute for each custom derived command class since this will keep the id consistent between sessions of Rhino GuidAttribute

properties.name: LocalName
properties.summary: Gets the local name of the command.

properties.name: PlugIn
properties.summary: Gets the plug-in where this commands is placed.

properties.name: Settings
properties.summary: Gets the settings of the command.
